reasoning: The control 2.2.4 pertains to automated patch management for operating systems, which is a cloud-specific infrastructure-level control. Kubernetes itself does not manage the underlying operating system patching of the nodes; this is typically handled by the cloud provider or the infrastructure management layer. Kubernetes focuses on orchestrating containerized applications and does not directly manage the OS patching of the nodes running the Kubernetes cluster.
title: Requirement 2.2.4
